How-To-Repeat: #!/bin/sh
#
#  written by Jesus Monroy, Jr. (thepinkpages@email.com
#  date: 1999.07.02
#  purpose: validate that base utilities have whatis(1) entry
#
D="/bin /sbin /usr/bin /usr/sbin"

for DIR in $D ; do
    cd $DIR
    echo ----------
    echo $DIR
    echo ----------
    L=`ls -1`
    for U in $L; do
        R=`whatis $U | grep "nothing"`
        if [ X"$R" != X"" ] ; then
            echo $R
        fi
    done
done
